'''Cather Taan's Gun Shop''' was a weapon shop in [[Storrd Township]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Seregar]]. It was a small building with stucco walls and a large neon sign. Owned by its [[Cather Taan|eponymous proprietor]], it was widely considered the only decent weapons shop on Seregar.
{{Loc-stub}}
